Label: WHAT NOT TO DO
Line 1: Do not appeal before correcting the NDC/J-code mismatch
Line 2: Do not reuse old, default, or copied NDCs from previous claims without verification
Line 3: Do not guess at the manufacturer, quantity, or drug lot always Verify with MR
Line 4: Do not submit a corrected claim with the same incorrect NDC
Line 5: Do not appeal a N846 denial if you have not yet submitted a corrected claim first

Label: WHAT NOT TO DO
Line 1: Do not appeal before submitting a corrected claim with the correct UOM
Line 2: Do not copy UOM from a prior claim without verifying against the current vial label
Line 3: Do not guess the UOM based on the J-code alone — always verify from the actual drug label
Line 4: Do not submit the same incorrect UOM on the corrected claim
Line 5: Do not leave the UOM field blank and resubmit — a blank UOM will deny again with N816
